project_description: Decommission and replacement of wholesale customer billing system. Old system: RPG on IBM AS/400 (iSeries), new: Java + PostgreSQL + Jasper Reports. Data migration of 15 years of history, parallel operation for 6 months, finance department training (50 people), auditor certification.
client_history: AS/400 — last programmer who knew RPG left 2 years ago.
risk_patterns: No RPG/AS400 experts on the market — understanding logic from source code without documentation.
pm_comment: Reverse engineering 25 years of business logic from RPG took 8 months.
